I'm Ranjith — someone who takes life seriously but never forgets to enjoy the little moments. Between navigating courtrooms, running a business, and hitting the road to explore new places, I still find time for a good movie and a quiet evening with family. I believe in building something meaningful — not just professionally, but in every relationship I'm part of. I'm rooted in my values, proud of where I come from, and genuinely excited about the life ahead.
